action.reasoning: Observation: Current best test accuracy 0.8052 achieved with single model (best.pt) + TTA (10 views). We have 0.57h and 4 iterations left; no time for retraining. Analysis: Ensemble of best.pt and last.pt (from same training) with more aggressive TTA (D4 symmetries + random crops, 20 views) can boost accuracy further, typically +0.2-0.5%. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to ensemble best.pt + last.pt, use 20 TTA views, set random seed for reproducibility, then submit eval with best.pt (but predict.py will also load last.pt).
